Class xZombie

java.lang.Object
xEntity
xHuman
xZombie
public class xZombie extends xHuman
Represents a zombie in the simulation. Zombies can move around the board and infect nearby humans. If a zombie finds a human in a neighboring cell, it converts that human into a zombie.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class xEntity

    xEntity.Direction

    • xZombie

      public xZombie(int r, int c)
      Constructs a zombie at the given position.
      Parameters:
      r - the starting row
      c - the starting column

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns the map symbol for a zombie.
      Overrides:
      toString in class xHuman
      Returns:
      the string "Z"

    • searchHuman

      public int searchHuman(int x, int y, ArrayList<xHuman> humanList)
      Searches for a human at the given position in the human list.
      Parameters:
      x - the row to search
      y - the column to search
      humanList - the list of humans
      Returns:
      the index of the human if found, or -1 if not found

    • findFirstHumanNeighbour

      public Point findFirstHumanNeighbour(int r, int c, int rows, int cols, ArrayList<xHuman> humanList)
      Finds the first human in the neighboring cells around the zombie. The search checks all cells in a 1-tile radius around the zombie, excluding the zombie's own position.
      Parameters:
      r - the zombie's row
      c - the zombie's column
      rows - the total number of rows in the grid
      cols - the total number of columns in the grid
      humanList - the list of humans
      Returns:
      the position of the first neighboring human, or null if none found

    • act

      public void act(ArrayList<xHuman> humanList, ArrayList<xZombie> zombieList, char[][] grid, int rows, int cols, xLifeModel model)
      Performs this zombie's action for one simulation step. The zombie first checks for nearby humans to infect. If a human is found, that human is removed and replaced with a new zombie. If no human is found, the zombie moves randomly to a valid location.
      Parameters:
      humanList - the list of humans
      zombieList - the list of zombies
      grid - the simulation grid
      rows - the total number of rows
      cols - the total number of columns
      model - the game model controlling the simulation
